appliedUpdates.description: Added documentation for internal Midscene APIs (agent.destroy, addDumpUpdateListener) and executionDump structure, and noted that hardware mouse tracking must be disabled during active execution phase to avoid false positive interrupts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Workers can use simple Node or Python patch scripts to make structured edits instead of struggling with standard Edit tools for large changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature interruptible-execution used custom Node.js and Python scripts to patch main.ts and useGeminiLive.ts instead of relying on the standard Edit tool.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker discovered pre-existing frontend lint errors in frontend/main.ts regarding 'any' types and unused variables.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not a convention or library knowledge; just a codebase bug/issue.
